summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Organizational Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve employee experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ {tools|programs} and 10+ {coord|vendors}, refining {tools|positioning}, delivery strategy, and operations
Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate listening sessions to analyze needs of 25 global {cross|stakeholders}, resulting in 3 new {tools|programs} best aligned with needs
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting {ex|engagement} and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Improved {ex|employee experience} by streamlining immigration and relocation processes through coordination with cross-functional teams
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Strengthened {ex|workplace engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose absenteeism drivers; analyze leave data to quantify costs
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
